mapper.sql: id, username, email, age, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, email, age, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{email}, #{age}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
update sys_user
username = #{username},
email = #{email},
age = #{age},
status = #{status},
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_user set deleted = 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select from sys_user where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
